description: Ecuadorian criminal and terrorist organization specializing in drug trafficking and hitman services. Formed in 2020 as a splinter group of Los Choneros after the death of Jorge Luis Zambrano. Has over 8,000 members and operates mainly in Latacunga, Cuenca, Machala, and Pastaza. Involved in prison riots and the assassination of presidential candidate Fernando Villavicencio.

country_links.evidence_quote: ...was arrested in Mexico and extradited to Colombia, where he is also wanted on charges of involvement with FARC dissidents .
country_links.context: A suspected leader of Los Lobos was extradited to Colombia, where he is wanted for involvement with FARC dissidents, indicating the organization's ties to Colombia.

country_links.evidence_quote: In March 2026, Ángel Esteban Aguilar Morales aka Lobo Menor, a suspected leader of Los Lobos accused of involvement in the Villavicencio assassination, was arrested in Mexico and extradited to Colombia...
country_links.context: A suspected leader of Los Lobos was arrested in Mexico, showing the organization's footprint there.

country_links.evidence_quote: On 16 November, Los Lobos leader Wilmer 'Pipo' Chavarria, who faked his death in 2021, was arrested in Málaga , Spain.
country_links.context: Los Lobos leader Wilmer 'Pipo' Chavarria was arrested in Málaga, Spain, indicating the organization's presence there.
